gmail.user.label: Gmail Address
gmail.user.help: The Gmail account whose unread inbox is summarised each morning.

gmail.refreshToken.label: Gmail OAuth Refresh Token
gmail.refreshToken.help: Long-lived token produced by the one-shot pnpm gmail:auth helper.

deliver.channel.label: Delivery Channel
deliver.channel.help: Channel the morning brief is posted to (must already be configured).

deliver.target.label: Delivery Target
deliver.target.help: Channel-specific destination (e.g. 'self' for a self-DM, or a JID/email).

lookbackHours.label: Look-back Window
lookbackHours.help: How many hours of unread items to include.

draftReplies.label: Draft Replies
draftReplies.help: Generate one-tap-approve reply drafts for items tagged NEEDS_REPLY.
